overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene beginning at a burning fire pit in a snowy mountain setting during a stormy night. The camera ascends ancient stone stairs, passes through a monumental carved gate, and continues into a narrow mountain pass with heavy snowfall and dramatic rocky terrain.

events.description: camera tilts up from the fire, reducing warm firelight and revealing more of the stormy ambient lighting
fire pit exits lower frame as stone stairs become the dominant focal point

agents.ego_description: standing near the fire pit, watching the flames, then slowly looking upward toward the stone stairs

entered.detail: circular stone enclosure containing burning logs with orange flames
large logs burning with bright orange flames and glowing embers
wide stone staircase ascending toward the mountain gate, covered in snow
massive ancient stone gate with carved decorations at the top of the stairs
ground covered in white snow with visible footprints and cracks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a burning fire pit in a snowy mountain environment during a heavy storm. The camera stands near the warmth of the flames, then slowly tilts upward to reveal a massive stone staircase ascending toward an ancient carved gate, with snow falling steadily through the dark night.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone stairway leading to monumental gate

events.description: camera passes through the stone archway into the mountain pass beyond

agents.ego_description: climbing the snow-covered stone stairs toward the carved gate, moving steadily upward

entered.detail: intricate stone carving of a dragon's head above the archway entrance
tall stone pillars flanking the gate entrance on the left side
tall stone pillars flanking the gate entrance on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wide stone staircase toward the monumental gate, the carved dragon head becoming more prominent as we approach. The ancient stone columns frame the entrance as heavy rain and snow fall around the structure, creating a dramatic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain canyon with rocky cliffs

events.description: visibility decreases as the canyon walls close in and snowfall intensifies in the narrow pass
camera navigates around rocky outcrops while winding through the narrow canyon

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow mountain pass, navigating between snow-covered rocks and cliff walls

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face covered in snow rising on the left side of the path
steep rocky mountain wall with snow and ice formations on the right
large boulders and rock formations scattered across the snowy path
snow-covered vegetation and small bushes along the canyon edge

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the camera enters a narrow mountain canyon with steep cliff walls on both sides. The path winds through snow-covered rocks and frozen vegetation as heavy rain continues to fall, reducing visibility in the enclosed passageway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warmth of a lonely fire pit into the oppressive enclosure of a stormy mountain canyon. It begins beside a burning fire pit in a snowy mountain environment, slowly tilting upward to reveal a massive stone staircase ascending toward an ancient carved gate under a dark, stormy night. As the camera climbs the wide stairs, the monumental gate and its carved dragon head loom larger, framed by stone columns amidst a heavy downpour of rain and snow. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through the gateway and enters a narrow mountain canyon, where the open ascent gives way to steep cliff walls. Finally, the path winds through snow-covered rocks and frozen vegetation, with the falling rain further reducing visibility within the enclosed passageway.
